title: Pooled Registered Pension Plans (PRPPs) - Canada.ca
content:
## Pooled Registered Pension Plans (PRPPs)
Registering and Administering a Pooled Registered Pension Plan Webinar
This webcast is a recording of a joint webinar by the Canada Revenue Agency and the Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions about the steps required to register and administer a PRPP. The original webinar occurred in March 2014.

## What's new for PRPPs

## Services and information
- Administrative Procedures
- Pooled Registered Pension Plan (PRPP) contribution receipt return
- Frequently asked questions
- About the Registered Plans Directorate
- Contact the Registered Plans Directorate

## Forms and publications
- PRPP related forms and publications
- Registered Plans related forms and publications
When you subscribe to our electronic mailing list , we'll notify you by email when important new information is added to the Registered Plans Web site.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
